title: review_verdict record
description: Append a Reviewer verdict (one per review pass). The rich content (fatal_flaws + missing_experiments/analysis + overclaims + unsupported_claims + rewrite_requirements + experiment_todo/analysis_todo/rewrite_todo + routing_recommendation) lives in the verdict_ref artifact (runs/<q>/review/verdict-<n>.json) and is validated by `review validate`. valid / route_target / operator_confirmed are NOT settable here (additionalProperties:false); valid is force-reset to 0 and computed only by `review validate`. The finalize review gate reads the latest valid verdict, never artifact existence.

verdict_ref.description: loop-relative path to the typed verdict.json artifact
